failed_checks.description: close missing rate must be 0; pe/pb/roe high missing is warning (low announce freq)
failed_checks.recommendation: Fix close missing values before modeling.

repair_actions.reason: close is required for return features (return_1d/return_5d/volatility_20d) and label (label_next_5d); rows with missing close cannot be safely used for supervised modeling
repair_actions.expected_effect: remove rows with missing close; dependent fields (return/volatility/label) on remaining rows are recomputed by re-running executor in a full pipeline; baseline repair keeps existing values and only drops the bad rows

not_repaired_items.reason: low announce frequency is expected for fundamentals; not a failure, only a warning; no repair needed
reflects simulated data design (one ticker missing industry); kept as-is; downstream can encode as 'unknown'
